3136180.name: Voltaria
3136180.description:
Enter Voltaria — a fragile underground world held together by ancient elemental forces. When the core that sustains life shatters, chaos spreads across the land, twisting guardians, corrupting memories, and pulling the entire realm toward collapse.

You play as Pii, a small wanderer with a spark of determination and a choice-driven future. Explore atmospheric 2D environments, face powerful element-based bosses, and make decisions that shift the fate of both friend and foe. Every encounter can be resolved through skill, empathy, or force… and each choice leaves a mark on the world around you.

Uncover hidden histories, navigate shifting landscapes, and forge your own path through a narrative that reacts to your actions. Voltaria will not be saved by strength alone — it will be shaped by who you choose to become.

Your journey decides the ending.
Will you restore balance… or rewrite the world?
3136180.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
